name: Apifox
description: Integrated API design, documentation, debugging, mock and testing platform; Chinese Postman+Swagger+JMeter.

seo.title: Apifox — Developer Portals / API Management
seo.meta_description: Apifox: Integrated API design, documentation, debugging, mock and testing platform; Chinese Postman+Swagger+JMeter.

when_to_use: All-in-one API design + mock + test as Postman replacement
Auto-generated docs from OpenAPI spec with live examples
Team collaboration on API contracts before development
Automated regression testing in CI for REST APIs
Performance testing for API endpoints within same tool

pros: Design, mock, debug, test in one app
cons: Data sovereignty concerns for some firms
review.verdict: Apifox is Postman+Swagger+JMeter merged—genuinely productive, if your org is OK with a Chinese vendor.
review.best_for: Teams wanting an integrated API design+test suite without juggling four tools
review.not_for: Organizations with strict bans on Chinese-origin SaaS
